goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of 'hotel' and should be in the 'east'.
The hotel 'doesn't need to have free parking'.
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has 'free parking'.
Make sure you get 'star of the hotel', 'postcode', and 'phone number'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'architecture'.
Make sure you get 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge

The hotel doesn't need to have free parking

You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of architecture
